description: Lists of debts and payments. Mercantile. Dating: 11th century. Mentions people such as Abū l-Faraj and Abū Zikrī, places such as al-Mahdiyya, and goods such as kohl. On parchment, with stitching still preserved where two pieces were tied together. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
